Getting-Started.title: Getting Started
Getting-Started.content:
How I Use This Vault
My Workflow

Capture - Quick notes, ideas, links
Organize - Add tags, link related notes
Build - npx quartz build
Deploy - git push
Share - Send link when needed


This is my personal space for thinking and building.

_Project-Planning-Index.title: 📋 Project Planning System
_Project-Planning-Index.content:
Project Planning System

Purpose: A comprehensive framework for planning ANY project from idea to execution


🚀 Quick Start
For a New Project:


Copy the Master Plan template

Template: 00-Project-Master-Plan
Fill in all 14 sections
This is your single source of truth



Create supporting documents as needed:

01-Market-Research - Market analysis
02-Technical-Spec - Technical architecture
03-Go-to-Market - Launch strategy
04-Feature-Brief - Individual features
05-Financial-Plan - Financial projections



Create project notes:

Meeting notes
Decision logs
Weekly reviews




📁 Template Library
Core Templates








































TemplatePurposeWhen to Use00-Project-Master-PlanComplete project blueprintStart of every project01-Market-ResearchMarket & competitive analysisBefore building02-Technical-SpecTechnical architectureBefore coding03-Go-to-MarketLaunch & marketing strategyBefore launch04-Feature-BriefIndividual feature specsFor each feature05-Financial-PlanFinancial projectionsFor funding/budget

🎯 Planning Process
Phase 1: Ideation (Week 1)
Goals:

 Validate problem exists
 Define target audience
 Size the market
 Analyze competition

Templates:

00-Project-Master-Plan - Sections 1-5
01-Market-Research

Output: Validated problem + market opportunity

Phase 2: Strategy (Week 2)
Goals:

 Define solution & vision
 Plan features (MVP vs future)
 Choose tech stack
 Design business model

Templates:

00-Project-Master-Plan - Sections 6-9
02-Technical-Spec

Output: Clear strategy + roadmap

Phase 3: Planning (Week 3)
Goals:

 Create detailed roadmap
 Estimate resources & budget
 Identify risks
 Define success metrics

Templates:

00-Project-Master-Plan - Sections 10-14
05-Financial-Plan

Output: Actionable plan + budget

Phase 4: Pre-Launch (Week 4+)
Goals:

 Build MVP
 Create launch plan
 Prepare marketing
 Set up analytics

Templates:

03-Go-to-Market
04-Feature-Brief (for each feature)

Output: Ready to launch!

Phase 5: Launch & Iterate
Goals:

 Launch product
 Measure results
 Gather feedback
 Iterate quickly

Templates:

Weekly reviews
Feature briefs for new features

Output: Growing product

📊 Project Types
Use This Framework For:

✅ Software Products (SaaS, mobile apps, platforms)
✅ Hardware Products (devices, IoT)
✅ Services (consulting, agencies)
✅ Content Projects (courses, media)
✅ Community Projects (events, organizations)
✅ Personal Projects (goals, learning)

Adapt As Needed:
Small project? Focus on:

Master Plan (abbreviated)
Feature briefs
Weekly reviews

Large project? Use everything:

Full Master Plan
All supporting docs
Detailed financials
Comprehensive GTM


🔧 How to Use with Sassy (AI Assistant)
1. Create Your Plan
Fill out the Master Plan template in Obsidian
2. Deploy to Quartz
./deploy.sh
3. Share with Sassy
Send the link:
Check out my project plan: 0xdou.github.io/my-notes/project-name

4. Get Feedback
Sassy can help with:

✅ Identifying gaps in your plan
✅ Suggesting improvements
✅ Technical architecture review
✅ Go-to-market strategy
✅ Financial projections review
✅ Feature prioritization
✅ Risk assessment

5. Iterate
Update your plan based on feedback and rebuild

📈 Best Practices
Do’s:

✅ Start with problem validation
✅ Be specific in your assumptions
✅ Update regularly (it’s a living document)
✅ Share with advisors for feedback
✅ Link related notes together
✅ Tag everything properly

Don’ts:

❌ Don’t skip market research
❌ Don’t be vague about target audience
❌ Don’t set it and forget it
❌ Don’t ignore competition
❌ Don’t over-engineer early on


🎓 Examples
Example 1: SaaS Startup

Full Master Plan
Detailed Technical Spec
Comprehensive GTM
3-Year Financial Model

Example 2: Mobile App

Master Plan (focused)
Technical Spec (mobile-focused)
App Store GTM strategy
Simple financials

Example 3: Personal Project

Abbreviated Master Plan
Feature list
Personal timeline
No financials needed


🔄 Review Cadence

































DocumentReview FrequencyMaster PlanMonthlyMarket ResearchQuarterlyTechnical SpecAs neededGTM PlanWeekly (pre-launch)Feature BriefsPer featureFinancial PlanMonthly

📚 Additional Resources
Related Templates:

Meeting Notes Template
Decision Log Template
Weekly Review Template
OKR Template

Frameworks:

Lean Canvas
Business Model Canvas
SWOT Analysis
Porter’s Five Forces
